LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FRANK MCGUIRE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED ON THE GROUNDS OF QUASI JUDICIAL IMMUNITY WITH 45-DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR MR. WALKER TO STATE, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH WHY HE THINKS HIS CASE FALLS OUTSIDE THE IMMUNITY. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED. MS. NAGLE IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SHARON M. NAGLE OF THE BOLD, POLISNER, MADDOW LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-925-933-7777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT WAS INFORMED OF MR. WALKER'S REFUSAL TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE THIS MORNING BY THE PRISON ADMINISTRATOR. DEFENDANT FRANK MCGUIRE'S Motion To Dismiss is Granted. No Opposition was filed. Ms. Nagle to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk

Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Continued To Nov-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Darnell Walker telephone number 559-992-7191 in Propria Persona.
Sharon Nagle of Bold, Polisner, Maddow, Nelson & Judson telephone number 925-933-7777 for Defendant Frank McGuire.

Mr. Walker explained why he is suing Mr. McGuire. The Court explained quasi judicial imunity. DEFENDANT FRANK MCGUIRE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained on the grounds of quasi judicial immunity with 45-days leave to amend for Mr. Walker to state, if he can do so in good faith why he thinks his case falls outside the immunity. The request for judicial notice is denied. Ms. Nagle is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
